name: update_memory
desc: Update Claude's persistent memory. Scopes: 'global' (provide 'file': user_preferences/business_logic/skillset), 'domain' (provide 'domain': e.g. '63_lighting' — Claude decides the right domain from context), 'chat' (this conversation's notes). Mode 'append' adds a bullet line, 'replace' overwrites content.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: For global scope: user_preferences, business_logic, or skillset

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: For domain scope: folder name e.g. '63_lighting', '52_drainage'
